hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q 'scripts/render\.ts$' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"scripts/render.ts was modified — remember to also update skills/matviz-render/SKILL.md (CLI flags table + recipes) and README.md (Headless CLI Renderer section) to keep them in sync before committing."}}' || true
